description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a black tabletop, featuring a natural wood grain pattern on its legs and drawer fronts. The desk is equipped with two drawers on the left side, one of which is partially open, and a single drawer on the right. On top of the desk sits a computer setup, including a monitor displaying abstract art, a keyboard, a mouse, and a large desktop tower. Several items are scattered across the surface, such as a red book, a stack of papers, a magazine, and two coffee mugs. The desk appears sturdy and functional, suitable for supporting electronic equipment and paperwork. The overall design suggests a utilitarian yet slightly decorative style, blending practicality with a touch of visual interest.
description: A sturdy wooden desk with a black top, drawers, and a complete computer setup, scattered with books, papers, and mugs. The desk features a natural wood grain pattern and is designed for practical use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the desk's drawers, computer monitor, desktop tower, keyboard, mouse, books, papers, and mugs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the desktop tower and the partially open left drawers.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the monitor, keyboard, and the right-side drawer, with less visibility of the desktop tower.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the monitor, keyboard, and the right drawer, with a clear look at the items on the desk surface.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the drawers and computer monitor, intended for sitting and working; the back is plain with no interactive features.
